Keep your mills running and your mines dewatered

Monitor hot strip mills, runout tables, crushers, conveyors, and dewatering pumps from the motor control cabinet. Detect failures weeks to months before they stop production.

27 failures detected at ArcelorMittal. 800% ROI at Nyrstar in 11 months. See results ↓

See How It Works Request a Demo

Trusted by leaders in metals and steel

Proof first

ArcelorMittal: 27 failures detected, €650k in downtime prevented

SAM4 monitors critical drivetrain assets across ArcelorMittal's steel operations. Including hot strip mill rollers, overhead cranes, and process pumps. Over a 12-month deployment, the system detected 27 developing faults before they caused unplanned stops.

Detections included bearing degradation on runout table rollers, coupling wear on mill drives, and electrical faults in overhead crane motors. Each alert gave maintenance teams weeks of advance warning to schedule repairs during planned downtime windows.

Read the full ArcelorMittal case study →
27 Failures detected in 12 months
€650k Downtime costs prevented
800% ROI at Nyrstar in 11 months
5 months Maximum advance warning

The challenge

Every hour of downtime costs six figures

Steel mills run 24/7 and mines can't stop dewatering. When a roller bearing fails or a borehole pump seizes, you face hours of lost production and emergency costs.

Hot strip mill reliability

Runout table rollers, cardan shafts, and mill motors operate under extreme stress. SAM4 detects bearing wear, coupling degradation, and electrical faults across the full drivetrain.

Submerged dewatering pumps

Borehole pumps sit 150-180 metres deep. Pulling one for walk-down costs thousands and takes days. SAM4 monitors from the MCC without a crane.

Conveyor and crusher uptime

Material flow depends on conveyors and crushers running continuously. SAM4 detects belt degradation, bearing failure, and motor faults before they halt production.

What we monitor

Critical assets in metals and mining

Crushers & Mills

Ball mills, SAG mills, and crushers with bearing, gearbox, and motor fault detection. Prevents costly production stops.

Learn more →

Conveyors

Belt conveyors and material handling systems with belt degradation alerts and drive system monitoring.

Learn more →

Pumps

Dewatering, slurry, and process pumps with cavitation detection, seal wear alerts, and efficiency monitoring.

Learn more →

We co-develop SAM4 for new use cases. Bring yours. 5 partner slots open for 2026.

SAM4 monitored ArcelorMittal's hot strip mill and caught 27 developing faults before any caused unplanned downtime.

Nyrstar: 800% ROI in 11 months

The zinc smelter deployed SAM4 across critical assets and achieved an 800% return on investment within the first year.

Read case study →
€650k Production loss avoided

16 early alerts on degrading rollers save €650k

SAM4 detected degrading bearings on 16 rollers in a hot strip mill before any failed, preventing extended production shutdowns.

Read case study →

How it works

Simple installation, immediate insights

SAM4 installs inside the motor control cabinet. No sensors on the hot strip mill, no access to underground pumps, no production interruption.

  1. Install in the MCC Clip-on current and voltage sensors attach to existing wiring in the motor control cabinet. Takes 60–90 minutes per asset.
  2. Connect to SAM4 cloud The DAQ device samples at 20 kHz and sends data securely to the SAM4 platform for AI analysis.
  3. Get actionable alerts Receive predictive alerts weeks to months before failure, with fault type, severity, and recommended action.
See how it installs →

From your most critical mills to every motor on site

Start with the ball mills and crushers that drive throughput. SAM4 installs at the MCC. Adding conveyors, fans, and pumps to the same monitoring fabric takes minutes, not months.

See How It Scales

Not sure yet?

Start with a paid validation

SAM4-X lets you prove the technology on your assets before committing to a fleet-wide contract. Fixed scope. Fixed price. Real results on your equipment, not a generic demo.

Learn About SAM4-X →

“The conveyors at our hot strip mill are a critical part of the production process, but it’s virtually impossible to use vibration-based techniques to assess their condition. SAM4 gave us precisely the insights we needed . Up to four months in advance.”

“Normally we would have called technicians either at night or in the weekend to make sure that we were able to continue running. And on an emergency the cost would be way higher than being able to plan it.”

Jac Valkenburg Project Lead, Nyrstar
